category.scope_note: Cross-standard comparison for power tools exported from China to Turkey where Turkey applies Customs Union-aligned CE logic and TS EN adoption for harmonised EN references in the machinery, electrical, EMC, noise, substances, and battery space.

title.en: China-to-Turkey Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入土耳其合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入土耳其合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China-to-Turkey power-tool compliance against Customs Union-aligned CE expectations, EN 62841-based safety expectations, Outdoor Noise marking duties, RoHS substances, and lithium-battery level obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具进入土耳其合规对照，覆盖关税同盟对齐逻辑下的CE路径、基于EN 62841的安全要求、户外噪声标识、RoHS限用物质及锂电池义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具進入土耳其合規對照，覆蓋關稅同盟對齊邏輯下的CE路徑、基於EN 62841的安全要求、戶外噪聲標識、RoHS限用物質及鋰電池義務。

disclaimer.en: This comparison is informational only and is not a certification result, legal opinion, customs ruling, customs valuation decision, or market-admission approval. Exporters and importers should confirm the active Turkish legal text, TSE references, market-surveillance channel, importer/representative ownership, ADR transport scope, and Mersin and Istanbul-Ambarli routing with qualified local advisors before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅供信息参考，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、税则估价结论或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商应在出货前由具备资质的土耳其专业人员核实生效土耳其法律文本、TSE参考、市场监督渠道、进口商/代表责任、ADR运输范围，以及默森（Mersin）和伊斯坦布尔阿姆巴勒（Istanbul-Ambarlı）口岸路线。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅供資訊參考，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、關稅估價結論或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商應在出貨前由具備資質的土耳其專業人員核實生效土耳其法律文本、TSE參考、市場監督渠道、進口商/代表責任、ADR運輸範圍，以及默森（Mersin）和伊斯坦堡阿姆巴勒（Istanbul-Ambarlı）口岸路線。

answer_first.en: For Turkey-facing power tools, the practical baseline is CE-based machinery conformity with EN 62841 as the common technical standard family, EN 62841 and EU-reference harmonisation mapped through TSE TS EN where available, LVD and EMC obligations for in-scope accessories, outdoor-noise duties for listed outdoor-use equipment, RoHS substances, and battery-level obligations for cordless tools. Turkish grid practice of 230/400 V 50 Hz differs from China's 220/380 V profile, and in-country importer, representative, and post-market surveillance contact structures are commercially and operationally critical.
answer_first.zh: 针对土耳其市场的电动工具，实操基线是基于CE的机械类合规框架，并以EN 62841为通用技术标准族，通过TSE TS EN映射相关EU参考标准，覆盖在适用范围内充电器和电源的LVD、电磁兼容、列名户外设备的户外噪声义务、RoHS限用物质以及无绳工具的电池层级要求。土耳其电网以230/400V 50Hz为主，需与中国220/380V差异匹配，同时境内进口商、代表人和售后监督联络链条是市场放行中的关键商业和运营前提。
answer_first.zht: 針對土耳其市場的電動工具，實務基線是基於CE的機械類合規框架，並以EN 62841為通用技術標準族，通過TSE TS EN映射相關EU參考標準，覆蓋在適用範圍內充電器和電源的LVD、EMC、列名戶外設備的戶外噪聲義務、RoHS限用物質以及無繩工具的電池層級要求。土耳其電網以230/400V 50Hz為主，需與中國220/380V差異匹配，同時境內進口商、代表人和售後監督聯絡鏈條是市場放行中的關鍵商務及營運前提。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Keep dataset_id, schema_version, last_verified, source URLs, and source_accessed dates synchronized when Turkey market obligations or Turkey-to-EU technical alignment references change.
